name: Oud Wood
notes: Rare Oud, Sandalwood, Cardamom, Sichuan Pepper, Vetiver, Amber
description: A pioneering masterpiece blending rich, smoky agarwood with exotic spices. Highly sophisticated, clean, and commanding.

name: Vanille Fatale
notes: Madagascar Vanilla, Roasted Coffee, Frangipani, Barley, Suede
description: An intense, smoky take on sweet vanilla laced with bitter coffee notes. Deeply intoxicating, dark, and provocative.

name: Fucking Fabulous
notes: Bitter Almond, Leather, Clary Sage, Orris Root, Tonka Bean
description: An explicit, bold leather composition with a creamy almond heart. Highly exclusive, dry, and starkly memorable.

name: Fucking Fabulous (Alternate Edition)
notes: Bitter Almond, Leather, Cashmeran, Lavender, Tonka Bean
description: A premium, texturized leather statement highlighting heavy sage elements. Leaving an imposing, luxury minimalist trail.

name: Neroli Portofino
notes: Tunisian Neroli, Italian Bergamot, Sicilian Lemon, Amber
description: A crisp, vibrant interpretation of the Italian Riviera. Bursting with fresh citrus, clean florals, and amber undertones.

name: Oud Wood (Eau de Parfum)
notes: Agarwood, Rosewood, Cardamom, Tonka Bean, Sandalwood
description: A classic luxury presentation of precious oriental wood notes. Warm, comforting, and perfectly balanced with amber resins.

name: Rose Prick
notes: May Rose, Bulgarian Rose, Turkish Rose, Patchouli, Sichuan Pepper
description: A wild bouquet of rare roses built on sharp, biting spices. Grounded by a rich, earthy patchouli base.

name: Bitter Peach
notes: Pêche de Vigne, Blood Orange, Patchouli, Davana, Cognac
description: An explicit, sweet-turned-dark peach drenched in fine liquor. Intensely rich, fruity, and highly addictive.

name: Tubéreuse Nue
notes: Tuberose, Lily, Suede, Soft Musk, Timut Pepper, Benzoin
description: A deep, carnal white floral blended with supple leather tones. Softly sensual, striking, and deeply textured.

name: Rose Prick (Travel Size)
notes: Bulgarian Rose, Turkish Rose, Sichuan Pepper, Turmeric, Tonka Bean
description: The iconic, dangerously sharp rose scent in an artisanal compact format. Warm, blooming, and richly spicy.

name: Lost Cherry
notes: Black Cherry, Bitter Almond, Cherry Liqueur, Turkish Rose, Peru Balsam
description: A voluptuous journey into a full-bodied dark fruit accord. Dripping with sweet syrup, fine liquor, and exotic wood warmth.

name: Neroli Portofino (Eau de Parfum)
notes: Neroli, Orange Blossom, Jasmine, Lavender, Angelica Root
description: A luminous, clean coastal fragrance mimicking fresh ocean breezes. Highly refreshing, effervescent, and bright.

name: Tobacco Vanille
notes: Tobacco Leaf, Ginger, Cocoa, Vanilla, Sweet Wood Sap
description: An opulent, classic English club scent reimagined. Heavy tobacco leaf layered with creamy vanilla and spiced dried fruits.

name: Soleil Blanc
notes: Coco de Mer, Ylang Ylang, Pistachio, Cardamom, Amber
description: A sultry, sun-drenched private island escape. Creamy, warm, and redolent of solar florals and amber warmth.

name: Costa Azzurra
notes: Driftwood, Sea Salt, Seaweed, Oud, Celery Seeds, Myrtle
description: A coastal escape blending refreshing salty sea air with rich, dark woody pine forests. Crisp, marine, and complex.

name: Cherry Smoke
notes: Dark Cherry, Saffron, Osmantus, Smoked Leather, Cypriol
description: A hedonistic scent capturing a dark, fiery fruit signature. Heavy with rich leather and glowing wood smoke tones.

name: Café Rose
notes: Turkish Rose, Dark Coffee, Bulgarian Rose, Patchouli, Cardamom
description: An elegant dance of dark sophistication. Marries a voluptuous, rich rose bouquet with a sharp, bitter espresso kick.

name: Black Orchid (Eau de Toilette)
notes: Black Orchid, Black Truffle, Ylang Ylang, Patchouli, Blackcurrant
description: A lighter, sharper variation of the iconic oriental floral. Intensely mysterious, dark, and highly hypnotic.

name: Grey Vetiver
notes: Vetiver, Grapefruit, Orange Blossom, Sage, Nutmeg, Pimento
description: The ultimate signature scent of refined masculinity. Clean, cool vetiver contrasted with bright citrus and warm spices.

name: Black Orchid (Parfum)
notes: Black Truffle, Ylang Ylang, Rum, Black Orchid, Patchouli
description: The most intense, amplified presentation of Black Orchid. Drenched in gold rum, rich patchouli, and heavy florals.

name: Oud Minérale
notes: Marine Notes, Oud, Sea Salt, Pink Pepper, Styrax, Seaweed
description: An unusual, striking clash of desert warmth and ocean cold. Briny mineral notes meeting precious, heavy oud.

name: Black Orchid (Eau de Parfum)
notes: Black Orchid, Truffle, Patchouli, Dark Chocolate, Incense
description: A timelessly dark, dramatic masterpiece. Luxurious dark chocolate and smoky incense framing an elusive orchid flower.

name: Ombré Leather
notes: Cardamom, Jasmine Sambac, Black Leather, Patchouli, White Moss
description: A sprawling, texturized open-space leather scent. Rugged, bold, and highly alluring with smooth floral highlights.

name: Silver Mountain Water
notes: Blackcurrant, Green Tea, Bergamot, Musk, Galbanum
description: An icy, refreshing blast reminiscent of Swiss alpine streams. Crisp, clean, and carrying a distinct green tea signature.

name: Green Irish Tweed
notes: Lemon Verbena, Iris, Violet Leaf, Ambergris, Mysore Sandalwood
description: A quintessential gentlemen's fougère. Smells like a fresh morning walk through dew-soaked, emerald Irish estates.

name: Bois du Portugal
notes: Bergamot, Lavender, Cedarwood, Mysore Sandalwood, Vetiver
description: A rich, classic, warm woody masterpiece. Deeply masculine, highly mature, and commanding instant respect.

name: Royal Oud
notes: Pink Pepper, Cedar, Galbanum, Angelica Root, Regal Oud
description: A magnificent, silky woody architecture. Focuses on smooth, bright spices and dry, majestic palace wood notes.

name: Himalaya
notes: Calabrian Bergamot, Sandalwood, Cedar, Musk, Ambergris
description: A clean, metallic freshness mimicking snow-covered mountain peaks. Grounded by a rich, warm masculine sandalwood heart.

name: Aventus Cologne
notes: Mandarin, Ginger, Pink Pepper, Vetiver, Birch, Musk
description: A vitalizing, fresh, and expressive twist on the classic Aventus identity. Light, urban, and buzzing with energy.

name: Virgin Island Water
notes: Coconut, Lime, White Rum, Sugar Cane, Mandarin, Jasmine
description: A premium tropical paradise in a bottle. Crisp Caribbean lime washed over smooth, creamy coconut milk and heavy rum.

name: Aventus
notes: Pineapple, Birch Wood, Bergamot, Blackcurrant, Ambergris
description: The legendary powerhouse of luxury perfumery. Opens with a sweet, smoky blast of fresh pineapple and rich, charred birch.

name: Viking Cologne
notes: Bergamot, Lemon, Pink Pepper, Lavender, Sandalwood, Vetiver
description: An aromatic, refreshing tonic capturing a cool maritime awakening. Highly clean, bracing, and intensely energetic.

name: Y (Eau de Parfum)
notes: Apple, Ginger, Sage, Juniper Berries, Amberwood, Tonka Bean
description: A modern, blue-style crowd-pleaser. Highly crisp, modern, and projecting an unmatched fresh laundry and sharp spice trail.

name: Y L'Elixir
notes: Diva Lavender, Geranium, Mysterious Incense, Natural Oud Wood
description: The highest concentration of the Y collection. An enigmatic, dark blue opus adding dark, smoky incense and natural leather oud.

name: Y Le Parfum
notes: Apple, Aldehydes, Sage, Lavender, Cedarwood, Patchouli
description: A dark, smooth, and deeply velvety execution of the signature blue accord. Highly professional, rich, and clean.

name: Y (Eau de Parfum Intense)
notes: Blue Juniper Berries, Diva Lavender, Patchouli, Cedarwood
description: An amplified, spicy variation shifting focus toward clean aromatic herbs and long-lasting, deep woody earthy tones.

name: Libre (Eau de Parfum Intense)
notes: French Lavender, Moroccan Orange Blossom, Orchid, Madagascar Vanilla
description: A sultry, deep, and blazing floral profile. Amplified with a sweet, heavy vanilla intensity and creamy orchids.

name: Libre (Eau de Parfum)
notes: Diva Lavender, Orange Blossom, Mandarin Orange, Ambergris
description: The definitive modern signature of female freedom. Blends clean, traditionally masculine lavender with an elegant floral heart.

name: Libre (Dress Me Wild Collector Edition)
notes: Lavender, Orange Blossom, Neroli, Vanilla, Tonka Bean
description: The highly sought-after, limited edition cheetah print flacon. Houses an extra-sensual, warm, and hyper-luxurious lavender experience.

name: Libre Le Parfum
notes: Saffron, Ginger, Lavender, Orange Blossom, Honey, Bourbon Vanilla
description: The richest, warmest iteration of Libre. Infused with a fiery golden saffron spice, ginger, and a thick luxury honey finish.

name: Mon Paris (Eau de Parfum)
notes: Strawberry, Raspberry, Pear, Datura Flower, Patchouli, White Musk
description: A passionate, dizzying journey to Paris. A luscious, sweet red berry explosion balanced cleanly by transparent musk.

name: Black Opium (Eau de Parfum)
notes: Black Coffee, Vanilla, White Florals, Jasmine, Pink Pepper
description: An incredibly popular, highly seductive night fragrance. Powered by a dark shot of rich adrenaline-fueled espresso and sweet vanilla.

name: MYSLF
notes: Calabrian Bergamot, Tunisian Orange Blossom, Ambrofix, Patchouli
description: A sleek, clean statement of modern masculinity. Blends a unique, radiant floral heart with clean woods and modern ambers.

name: Acqua Di Giò (Eau de Toilette)
notes: Marine Notes, Bergamot, Jasmine, Persimmon, Cedarwood, Patchouli
description: The undisputed King of fresh aquatic fragrances. Captures pure marine wind, bright Mediterranean sun, and clean coastal woods.

name: Black Opium Over Red
notes: Black Cherry, Black Coffee, Jasmine, Madagascar Vanilla, Patchouli
description: A brilliant, juicy update to the signature coffee base, dripping with dark, dark-red cherry syrup. Deeply seductive.

name: Black Opium Floral Shock
notes: Iced Coffee, Freesia, Gardenia, Solar Notes, White Musk
description: A biting, refreshing shock of energy. Swaps out heavy sweetness for a crisp, icy-cold coffee and glowing white florals.

name: La Nuit de L'Homme L'Intense
notes: Iris Concrete, Violet, Vanilla, Tonka Bean, Sage, Patchouli
description: A highly sensual, powder-soft evening masterpiece. Heavy iris blended with dark vanillas for a compelling intimate trail.

name: La Nuit de L'Homme (Eau de Toilette)
notes: Cardamom, Virginia Cedar, Lavender, Vetiver, Caraway
description: The legendary standard for date-night perfumery. Built completely on a dark, seductive explosion of fresh-crushed spice and clean woods.

name: Sì Passione Intense
notes: Blackcurrant Nectar, Jasmine Absolute, Patchouli, Vanilla, White Musk
description: An incredibly vibrant, intense red statement. Captures true floral passion using heavy blackcurrant and rich jasmine absolute.

name: My Way (Eau de Parfum)
notes: Orange Blossom, Tuberose, Jasmine, Madagascar Vanilla, Cedarwood
description: A bright, luminous white floral bouquet sourced from around the globe. Elegantly clean, sweet, and highly radiant.

name: My Way Édition Nacre
notes: Calabrian Bergamot, Egyptian Orange Blossom, Indian Tuberose, Jasmine, Virginian Cedarwood, White Musk
description: A sparkling, pearlescent variation of the classic floral bouquet, leaving an elegant shimmer on the skin and a radiant trail.

name: Armani Code Parfum
notes: Bergamot, Bergamot Leaf, Iris, Clary Sage, Cedarwood, Tonka Bean
description: A deeply magnetic, rewritten aromatic signature. Combines a pristine iris heart with a powerful, warm woody-amber base.

name: My Way Nectar (Red and Blue Bottle)
notes: Pear Accord, Green Mandarin, Orange Blossom, Tuberose, Bourbon Vanilla, White Musk
description: A sensual, ultra-fruity interpretation housed in a striking bi-color flacon. Blends juicy pear with creamy, addictive vanilla.

name: Because It's You
notes: Raspberry, Neroli, Rose Absolute, Vanilla, Musk, Amberwood
description: An explicitly bold, passionate feminine fragrance. Captures the power of love with ripe, sweet raspberry and sophisticated rose.

name: Armani Code (Eau de Toilette)
notes: Supercitrus Bergamot, Lavender, Cedarwood, Tonka Bean Absolute
description: An iconic, woodier and fresher take on masculine sensuality. Smooth lavender pairs with warm, comforting tonka bean.

name: Stronger With You Tobacco
notes: Black Pepper, Cinnamon, Tobacco Accord, Honey, Bourbon Vanilla
description: A rich, texturized oriental composition. Infuses a smoky, sweet tobacco accord with precious spices and warm vanilla notes.

name: Stronger With You Amber
notes: Amber Accord, Lavender, Madagascar Vanilla, Spices
description: A premium, amber-focused masterpiece. Highly sophisticated and warm, wrapping clean lavender in a deep, glowing resinous blanket.

name: Magenta Tanzanite
notes: Cardamom, Ginger, Cinnamon, Coffee, Tobacco, Vanilla
description: An haute couture interpretation of African warmth. A sharp spice opening gives way to a dark, smoky roasted coffee and tobacco blend.

name: My Way Parfum (Blue and Purple Bottle)
notes: Bergamot, Orange Blossom, Blue Iris Pallida, Tuberose, Ambrette, Cedarwood, Vanilla
description: The most intense, velvety, and powdery iteration of My Way. Focuses on noble blue iris layered over a deep, dark woody base.

name: Bright Crystal (Eau de Parfum)
notes: Yuzu, Pomegranate, Peony, Lotus, Magnolia, Raspberry, Amber, Musk
description: An amplified, extra-long-lasting version of the iconic floral. Vibrant yuzu and rich pomegranate bleed into a glamorous peony heart.

name: Yellow Diamond (Eau de Toilette)
notes: Citron de Diamante, Pear Sorbet, Neroli, Freesia, Orange Blossom, Amber Wood
description: A bright, luminous floral fragrance that feels like hot summer sunshine. Clean, transparent, and intensely effervescent.

name: Bright Crystal Absolu (Pour Femme Parfum)
notes: Yuzu, Pomegranate, Ice Accord, Peony, Magnolia, Lotus, Amber
description: A deeply concentrated, luxurious floral jewel. Intensely fresh, rich, and sparkling with clean, crystal-clear musk tones.

name: Crystal Noir (Eau de Parfum)
notes: Ginger, Cardamom, Pepper, Gardenia, Coconut, Sandalwood, Musk
description: A sultry, deeply seductive dark masterpiece. Blends hot spices with a rich, creamy coconut milk signature and heavy woods.

name: Eros Parfum
notes: Mint oil, Candied Apple, Lemon, Geranium, Tonka Bean, Ambermax
description: The ultimate, highly concentrated presentation of Eros. A bold, sweet mint and apple opening grounded by deep, imposing ambers.

name: Versace Pour Homme (Eau de Toilette)
notes: Bergamot, Neroli, Diamante Citron, Bitter Orange Leaves, Geranium, Cedar, Oud
description: A clean, Mediterranean professional standard. Highly refreshing, crisp, and carrying an unmatched fresh laundry and sharp citrus trail.

name: Eros Flame
notes: Chinotto Citrus, Black Pepper, Rosemary, Pepperwood, Texas Cedar, Vanilla
description: A fiery, dynamic contrast of cold and hot. Bitter citrus and heavy black pepper crackle beautifully over a sweet vanilla-wood base.

name: Eros (Eau de Toilette)
notes: Mint Leaves, Italian Lemon Zest, Green Apple, Tonka Bean, Oakmoss
description: The legendary clubbing powerhouse. Highly vibrant, sweet, and projecting an intense trail of fresh mint and addictive tonka vanilla.

name: Gucci Bloom
notes: Rangoon Creeper, Tuberose Bud, Jasmine Sambac Absolute
description: A pristine white floral bouquet designed to capture a rich, blooming garden. Sophisticated, powdery, and timelessly elegant.

name: Gucci Bloom Acqua di Fiori
notes: Galbanum, Cassis Buds, Tuberose, Jasmine, Musk, Sandalwood
description: A fresh, green, and watery variation of Bloom. Mimics morning dew on wild garden leaves, adding a crisp, vitalizing energy.

name: Gucci Bloom Profumo di Fiori
notes: Jasmine Sambac, Ylang-Ylang, Tuberose, Sandalwood, Orris, Benzoin
description: A rich, golden-hued floral experience. Embraces the intense, solar warmth of ylang-ylang alongside deep, resinous woods.

name: Gucci Bloom Intense
notes: Ginger, Pear, Mandarin, Orange Blossom, Tuberose, Patchouli, Moss
description: A hypnotic, nocturnal take on the classic white floral signature. Darkened by deep, earthy patchouli and sensual night-blooming notes.

name: Gucci Flora Gorgeous Jasmine
notes: Grandiflorum Jasmine, Mandarin Essence, Magnolia Accord, Sandalwood
description: A radiant, uplifting floral masterpiece. Crowned by a glowing, cheerful jasmine heart that leaves a clean, comforting skin trail.

name: Gucci Flora Gorgeous Magnolia
notes: Dewberry Accord, Magnolia Essence, Patchouli Essence, Blonde Woods
description: An enigmatic, smooth, and deeply velvety composition blending rich purple berries with a striking, lush magnolia bloom.

name: Gucci Flora Gorgeous Gardenia (Eau de Parfum)
notes: Pear Blossom, White Gardenia, Jasmine, Brown Sugar, Patchouli
description: A deliciously sweet, joyful signature. Intensely addictive white gardenia flowers paired perfectly with a warm brown sugar base.

name: Gucci Flora Gorgeous Orchid
notes: Vanilla Duo, Vanilla Orchid, Ozonic Accord, Gourmand Accord
description: A striking contrast of creamy, rich gourmand vanilla and clean, fresh ozonic air. Modern, airy, and beautifully balanced.

name: Gucci Flora Gorgeous Gardenia (Eau de Toilette)
notes: Red Berries, Pear, White Gardenia, Frangipani, Patchouli
description: A lighter, crisper, and more transparent execution of the iconic gardenia. Highly refreshing, bright, and fruity.

name: Gucci Flora Gorgeous Gardenia (Refillable Spray)
notes: Pear Blossom, White Gardenia, Red Berries, Brown Sugar, Patchouli
description: The premium, eco-luxury presentation of the classic EDP in a sleek, rechargeable flacon. Sweet, floral, and sustainable.

name: Gucci Flora Emerald Gardenia
notes: Lemon, Pear, Watermelon, Gardenia, Frangipani, Lotus, Musk, Cedar
description: A rare, limited-edition collector's item. Offers a refreshing, watery green spin on soft gardenia flowers and sweet summer melon.

name: Gucci Flora Glamorous Magnolia (Eau de Toilette)
notes: Freesia, Green Leaves, Citrus, Magnolia, Peony, Musk, Sandalwood, Mexican Chocolate
description: A beautiful, textured floral profile. Blends fresh, bright magnolia petals with an unexpected, soft hint of rich dark chocolate.

name: Gucci Guilty (Eau de Toilette)
notes: Mandarin, Pink Pepper, Peach, Lilac, Geranium, Amber, Patchouli
description: A bold, rebellious oriental floral. Combines a distinct, spicy punch of pink pepper with soft peach and warm golden amber.

name: Gucci Guilty Pour Homme (Eau de Toilette)
notes: Italian Lemon, French Lavender, Orange Blossom, Patchouli, Cedarwood
description: A highly modern, provocative classic. Blends unconventional, clean orange blossom with sharp citrus and deep, commanding woods.

name: Gucci Flora (Eau de Parfum)
notes: Citrus, Peony, Mandarin, Osmahnthus, Rose, Sandalwood, Pink Pepper
description: The deep, velvety, vintage floral classic. Highly professional, rich, and leaving a lasting impression of sophisticated roses.

name: Gucci Guilty Pour Femme (Eau de Parfum)
notes: Mandora Citrus, Pink Pepper, Lilac, Violet, Patchouli Oil
description: An amplified, rich, and deeply refined statement. Highly texturized lilac flowers layered over a rich, smooth patchouli foundation.

name: Coco Mademoiselle
notes: Orange, Bergamot, Rose, Jasmine, Patchouli, Vetiver, White Musk
description: An undisputed masterpiece of luxury modern perfumery. Opens with crisp, sparkling citrus that settles into a rich, sophisticated patchouli.

name: Coco Mademoiselle Intense
notes: Sicilian Orange, Calabrian Bergamot, Rose, Jasmine, Extreme Patchouli, Amber, Tonka Bean
description: An opulent, deeper variation of the classic identity. Shines a heavy spotlight on a massive dose of warm patchouli and deep amber resins.

name: N°5 (Eau de Parfum)
notes: Aldehydes, Ylang-Ylang, Neroli, May Rose, Jasmine, Sandalwood, Bourbon Vanilla
description: The most legendary fragrance in history. A timeless, ultra-powdery masterpiece driven by clean, sparkling aldehydes and rich abstract florals.

name: Allure Homme Sport Cologne
notes: Mandarin, Lemon, Grapefruit, Spicy Resin, Cedarwood, White Musk
description: A vitalizing, hyper-fresh blast of solar energy. Smells like sharp, crisp, freezing-cold citrus over clean, athletic white musk.

name: Coco Noir
notes: Grapefruit, Bergamot, Rose, Geranium Leaf, Patchouli, Tonka Bean, Frankincense
description: A baroque, magnetic night scent. A dark, sophisticated patchouli base wrapped elegantly in a blanket of warm, smoky frankincense resin.

name: Allure Homme Édition Blanche
notes: Lemon, Bergamot, New Caledonian Sandalwood, Haitian Vetiver, Vanilla
description: A premium, avant-garde architectural scent. Masterfully mimics a high-end lemon meringue tart using smooth creamy vanilla and heavy sandalwood.

name: Allure Homme Sport (Eau de Toilette)
notes: Mandarin, Mint, Cypress, Clary Sage, Black Pepper, Cedar, Tonka Bean
description: The ultimate standard for a fresh, high-end athletic profile. Crisp ocean breezes layered smoothly with warm, addictive sweet spices.

name: Chance Eau Tendre (Eau de Parfum)
notes: Quince, Grapefruit, Rose Essence, Jasmine Absolute, White Musk
description: A intensely poetic, soft, and radiant composition. A luscious fruit-forward opening settling into a clean, luxury fabric-softener trail.

name: Bleu de Chanel (Eau de Toilette)
notes: Grapefruit, Mint, Pink Pepper, Ginger, Nutmeg, Jasmine, Incense, Cedar
description: The pioneer of modern 'blue' fragrances. Highly professional, fresh, and buzzing with crisp grapefruit and smoky incense energy.

name: Bleu de Chanel Parfum
notes: Lemon Zest, Bergamot, Mint, Lavender, New Caledonian Sandalwood, Amberwood
description: The richest, most majestic concentration of Bleu. Swaps out sharp spices for a smooth, deep, and creamy luxury sandalwood block.

name: Bleu de Chanel (Eau de Parfum)
notes: Grapefruit, Mint, Pink Pepper, Ginger, Amber, Cedarwood, Labdanum
description: The perfectly balanced version of the legendary lineup. Richer, rounder, and injecting warm, golden amber resins into clean woods.

name: For Her (Eau de Parfum)
notes: Rose, Peach Pulp, Rare Musk, Amber, Patchouli, Sandalwood
description: An intimate, deeply sensual statement. A velvety soft pink rose and sweet peach pulp layered beautifully over an iconic musk core.

name: Phantom (Eau de Toilette)
notes: Rhubarb, Lavender, Lemon Zest, Apple, Patchouli, Vanilla, Vetiver
description: A futuristic, tech-driven aromatic cocktail. Features an unusual, sweet, and metallic clash of green rhubarb, clean lavender, and hot vanilla.

name: Decadence
notes: Italian Plum, Saffron, Iris, Bulgarian Rose, Jasmine Sambac, Liquid Amber
description: An opulent, heavy luxury statement. A rich, jammy dark plum opening layered with warm saffron spice and deep, dripping golden resins.

name: Decadence Blue and Pink Purse Edition
notes: Plum, Iris, Saffron, Rose, Orris, Amber, Papyrus Wood
description: A highly collectible, limited-edition presentation of the iconic fragrance. Delivers a sophisticated, woody-floral trail with dark fruit warmth.

name: Daisy Eau So Intense
notes: Strawberry, Pear, Honey, Jasmine, Rose, Vanilla, Moss, Benzoin
description: A vibrant, extra-rich take on the classic Daisy identity. Drenched in sweet golden honey, ripe strawberries, and warm, soft moss tones.

name: Daisy (Eau de Toilette Spray)
notes: Violet Leaf, Blood Grapefruit, Strawberry, Gardenia, Jasmine, White Woods
description: A universally loved, innocent, and bright signature. Smells like crisp green violet leaves, sweet berries, and soft white woods.
